title: Yorkshire Homeware 12 Tier 36 Pair Over the Door Hanging Hook Shoe Rack Shelf Organiser Holder Storage Stand Space Saving Fixed Holder White
features: Yorkshire Homeware✅Holds up to 36 pairs; Three modular interlocking segments, each holding 12 pairs of shoes; Holds shoes with or without heels

Yorkshire Homeware✅Hassle free assembly, no tools required; fixed metal brackets with anti-scratch pads fit most standard UK doors with a depth from 3cm to 5.2cm; Additional non-fixed brackets fit door with a depth of 4cm
Yorkshire Homeware✅Sturdy and durable construction with metal bars and strong plastic sides; Curved side supports for added strength and stability; Sleek and minimalistic design

Yorkshire Homeware✅DURABLE MATERIAL:Made of heavy-duty and non-slip coated steel,our organizer is breathable and easy to clean protecting your items from dust and damage. And the expandable door hooks are suitable for between 3-5.5cm/1.18”-2.17” thick doors.

Yorkshire Homeware✅CLUTTER-FREE:Our shoe organizer transforms your area from cluttered to organized,so you no longer have to sacrifice your closet space for your shoes or accessories anymore. Great space saving solution for apartments and dorm rooms.

Yorkshire Homeware✅EASY TO ASSEMBLE:Easily assembled into a 12-shelve shoe rack,no tools needed and is perfectly solid once it’s on the door. No worry about shoes falling off,rack coming apart,etc.(Note:Using the coming screws to keep the shoe rack in place is needed to avoid the shoes falling off from the rack.)
Yorkshire Homeware✅Package Contents: 3 × Plastic Left Panels 3 × Plastic Right Panels 24 × Steel Tubes 2 × Door Hooks 2 × Door Hook Latches 1 × User Manual
Yorkshire Homeware✅Saves huge amounts of space; Easy access to all your shoes; Lightweight and easy to use; 180cm (H) x 57cm (W) x 19cm (D)
description: Product Description 36 PAIRS OVER THE DOOR SHOE RACK WALL HANGING CLOSET ORGANIZER STORAGE STAND This 36 Pair 12 Tie Over The Door Shoe Rack Hanging Organizer Storage Space Saver Shoes Hanger is an easy way to keep shoes organized and off the floor. Simple design is easy to install, just hang it over any door for a fresh, instant clutter-free solution. The door shoe rack you can safely and securely store up to 36 pairs giving you a simple and convenient solution to all of your shoe storage problems. It also gives you freedom to choose using one, two or three segments depending on your needs holding 12, 24 or 36 pairs of shoes. 12 Tier Shoe Rack 36 Pair Capacity Over The Door Shoe Rack Space Saver Indoor Use Only Ideal for Small Spaces HASSLE-FREE INSTALLATION Without the use of any tools, installing Rack is extremely straightforward and hassle-free. It features movable metal brackets that, in contrast to other racks, can securely fit the majority of standard-sized doors. IDEAL SHOE ORGANISER The Home Beauty 12 Tier over the Door is the ideal shoe organiser. Shoe Rack can accommodate 36 pairs. accepts shoes with or without heels and has three modular connected portions that can each hold 12 pairs of shoes. SLEEK AND MINIMALISTIC The basic form of this shoe rack let it blend in with almost any home's décor. Metal bars and sturdy plastic side supports are used to make the long-lasting structure, which is made to last YORKSHIRE HOMEWARE OVER THE DOOR HANGING SHOE RACK
